headline: 2+ yrs React.js/Next.js Expert | AI-Augmented Full-Stack Dev | Node.js | Mobile | AI-Assisted Development
summary: I am a seasoned software engineer with a strong background in React.js, Next.js, and AI-augmented full-stack development, delivering high-quality solutions with AI-assisted code generation, real-time chat systems, and optimized Lighthouse performance scores. My technical strengths include developing multi-tier RBAC admin panels, designing real-time chat and push notification systems, and optimizing high-traffic dashboards with Next.js code-splitting and lazy loading. I am looking for a challenging role that leverages my skills in AI-assisted development, full-stack engineering, and mobile app development, where I can drive innovation and deliver impactful solutions.
